title: Share The Family Photos
ticket: Grandma wants a photo folder shared with Sarah only.
clue: Sharing and security permissions both affect access.
tooltip: Test access with a non-owner account.
whyItMatters: Shared data must be usable and safe.
careerConnection: Folder sharing setup is common in support operations.

actionTask.instructions: Share one folder with one test user and verify read access.
actionTask.expectedResult: The intended user can open the folder safely.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Sharing dialog showing the selected user.

repeatTask: Repeat the sharing setup with fewer hints.
breakFixTask: Remove the user from sharing, then add them back.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Family photos are shared correctly and safely.

translationTerms.why: Lets the right people use files.
